files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+--swift-version 6.2
+--indent 4
+--wraparguments before-first
+--wrapparameters before-first
+--binarygrouping none
+--octalgrouping none
+--hexgrouping none
+--commas inline
+--ranges no-space
+--nospaceoperators ...
+--self init-only
+--stripunusedargs always
+--exclude .build,Packages,DerivedData,.swiftpm,Examples/ElevenLabsKitExample/.build
+

@@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
+included:
+  - Sources
+  - Tests
+  - Examples
+
+excluded:
+  - .build
+  - Packages
+  - DerivedData
+  - .swiftpm
+  - Examples/ElevenLabsKitExample/.build
+
+disabled_rules:
+  - trailing_whitespace
+  - line_length
+  - type_body_length
+  - file_length
+  - cyclomatic_complexity
+  - function_body_length
+  - identifier_name
+  - implicit_return
+  - opening_brace
+  - closure_parameter_position
+  - implicit_optional_initialization
+  - unused_setter_value
+
+opt_in_rules:
+  - empty_count
+  - empty_string
+  - first_where
+  - sorted_imports
